About Me

Hello,I am Chetan a Highly motivated 1st-year Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering (ENTC) student at MITAOE, graduating in 2029. Passionate about bridging the gap between hardware and software, with foundational skills in Python, HTML, and CSS. Eager to secure an entry-level internship to apply my coding knowledge to real-world projects and accelerate my learning in electronics and automation.
